name: Mont Blanc from Aiguille du Midi
blurb: The Alps' rooftop seen from the cable-car deck — Mont Blanc dome rising over the Vallée Blanche.

name: Half Dome from Glacier Point
blurb: Alpenglow on Half Dome's sheer face from the granite balcony above the valley.

name: Mount Fuji from Lake Kawaguchi
blurb: Reflected Fuji at first light, snow-capped above a still lake.

name: Matterhorn from Zermatt
blurb: The pyramid of the Matterhorn lit by sunrise above the Mattertal.

name: Trolltunga over Ringedalsvatnet
blurb: Granite tongue jutting 700 m above the fjord-lake.

name: Oia at sunset
blurb: White cubes tumbling toward a caldera sunset over the Aegean.

name: Cliffs of Moher
blurb: Two hundred metres of vertical Atlantic shoreline beneath O'Brien's Tower.

name: Bixby Bridge, Big Sur
blurb: The arched span carries Highway 1 across a canyon mouth where the Pacific meets the Santa Lucias.

name: Horseshoe Bend
blurb: The Colorado River carved a perfect U through the Navajo Sandstone.

name: Uluru at sunset
blurb: The monolith glowing molten red as the desert sun drops behind the viewer.

name: Bagan at sunset
blurb: Two thousand pagodas silhouetted on the dry plain as the sun drops over the Irrawaddy.

name: Plitvice Lakes
blurb: Travertine terraces stair-step down through dense beech forest, every basin a different blue.
